case_title: JOHN HALL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DECLARATION OF CHRISTOPHER B. DOLAN IN SUPPORT OF OBJECTION TO JUDGE BUSCH FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (OF NOTICE OF ASSIGMENT OF JUDGE JOHN A. SUTRO, JR.)

REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S AND SHERIFF DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION HENNESSEY, MICHAEL IN HIS OFFICIAL CAPACITY  SHERIFF  AND AS AN INDIVIDUAL
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF AND WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND MICHAEL HENNESSEY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS AS FOLLOWS: FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE RALPH CIVIL RIGHTS ACT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND MICHAEL HENNESSEY. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE BANE ACT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND MICHAEL HENNESSEY. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO MICHAEL HENNESSEY. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT HIRING, TRAINING, OR SUPERVISION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO MICHAEL HENNESSEY. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ASSAULT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BATTERY IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SEXUAL BATTERY (CIVIL CODE 1708.5) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD THE TERMS OF A WRITTEN CONTRACT IN GOOD FAITH, BUT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO MICHAEL HENNESSEY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: DIANE WICK, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shawn R. Miller of the Dolan Law Firm, 421-2800, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Warren Metlitzky of the City Attorney's Office, 554-3916, appearing for defendants and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND MICHAEL HENNESSEY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS AS FOLLOWS:
FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE RALPH CIVIL RIGHTS ACT
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained without leave to amend.
(2) as to Michael Hennessey is sustained without leave to amend.
SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE BANE ACT
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained without leave to amend.
(2) as to Michael Hennessey is sustained without leave to amend.
THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE
(1) as to Michael Hennessey is sustained without leave to amend.
FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT HIRING, TRAINING, OR SUPERVISION
(1) as to Michael Hennessey is sustained without leave to amend.
FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ASSAULT
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained without leave to amend.
SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BATTERY
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained without leave to amend.
SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SEXUAL BATTERY (CIVIL CODE 1708.5)
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained without leave to amend.
EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained without leave to amend.
NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT
(1) as to City And County Of San Francisco is sustained with leave to amend if plaintiff can plead the terms of a written contract in good faith.
(2) as to Michael Hennessey is sustained without leave to amend.
Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/DEW/AC) JUDGE: DIANE WICK, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT
